pages.title: Welcome to Bannerbound: Antiquity!
pages.text: Before starting your first &2&lsettlement&r, you must first survive on your own in this new world. First, you'll notice you &4cannot punch trees&r like in the regular game; you must craft your first &cset of bone tools&r. This is only one of many changes this mod will introduce.

pages.title: The Chronicle
pages.text: If you press &e{key:key.bannerbound.chronicle}&r on your keyboard, it will bring up the &eChronicle&r. This is the tutorial book of the mod, where you will find explanations for every system in the mod. You may also close this pop-up and reopen it whenever you'd like from the &eChronicle&r. Now, let's get started.

pages.title: Flint Age
pages.text: First, you must get yourself a &7&nflint knife&r. Start by &6smashing&r (&e{key:key.use}&r) gravel against a hard surface like stone.

pages.title: Flint blade
pages.text: Then, &6smash&r the flint again to get an &e&nflint blade&r.

pages.title: Grass fiber & sticks.
pages.text:
Use the &eflint blade&r to destroy grass to get &2&ngrass fiber&r. Use the &eblade&r to gather sticks from leaves or dead bushes. 
Then, in your inventory &9{key:key.inventory}&r, place a &6stick&r, a &2fiber&r, and a &eflint blade&r to get your first &3&lflint knife.

pages.title: Hunt
pages.text:
It is time to hunt. Use your &3flint knife&r to kill animals or fish for &lbone.&r Note: Bigger animals drop more &lbone&r. &bFish&r only have a &e50%&r chance of dropping a &lbone&r.
&2Tip: Cows are the easiest land animal to hunt, as they are the slowest. Get hunting!
